final_prompt.prompt:
Design an original, non-infringing Xiaohongshu (小红书) style book/note cover in a 9-grid vertical format for an amateur media creator.

Style/medium: 小红书素人风格 (Xiaohongshu amateur/casual aesthetic), flat editorial cover design
Composition: 9-grid layout (九宫格), vertical portrait orientation, product featured prominently, title text centered
Subject: DJI Pocket 4 camera as the featured product, held or displayed by an amateur creator

Lighting/mood: 
Color palette: 
Materials/textures: 
Text (verbatim): "大疆Pocket4初体验"
Constraints: cute and differentiated font style for the title text "大疆Pocket4初体验"; overall tone must feel like authentic amateur/UGC content, not polished advertising
Avoid:
